creator: ljboiler@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Dušan Vejnovič from comment #0)
I see from the log file that the error is a java out-of-memory problem.  Building Eclipse is a memory intensive job by itself, and using Poudriere to build it would just add to *more* memory use.

It would help to have specific details on how you have Poudriere set up, and the resources available on the system where you are running Poudriere to build this.
